EEPROM

FT24C32A EEPROM Module

Professional electronic component

v1.0
2025-09-26
Rev. A

Product Overview

EEPROM module based on the FT24C32A chip, providing 32Kbits of non-volatile memory storage via I2C interface. Ideal for applications requiring reliable data retention and easy integration with microcontrollers.

Product Views

TOP VIEW
Component placement and connectors
BOTTOM VIEW
Underside components and connections
KEY TECHNICAL
SPECIFICATIONS

🔌 CONNECTIVITY

Primary Interface: GPIO (Interrupt)
Connector Type: JST 4-pin 1.0mm
Logic Levels: VCC-referenced (2V – 5.5V tolerant)

PIN CONFIGURATION

Function Notes
Power Supply 3.3V or 5V
Ground Common ground for all components

KEY FEATURES

Integrated Chip
FT24C32A 32Kbit I2C EEPROM
Interface
I2C (2-wire)
Operating Voltage
1.8V to 5.5V
Communication Speed
Up to 400 kHz

ADDITIONAL TECHNICAL INFORMATION

Basic Commands

Command Description Example
scan Scan for I2C devices and detect EEPROM scan
read Read data from memory address read 0x0000 16
write Write text to memory address write 0x0000 Hello World
erase Erase entire EEPROM (fill with 0xFF) erase
wpcheck [addr] Check write protection status wpcheck 0x0000
addr Set EEPROM I2C address manually addr 0x50

TYPICAL APPLICATIONS

Application Description
Data logging and storage Store sensor readings, logs, or event data for later retrieval.
Configuration storage Save device settings or calibration data that must persist after power loss.
Non-volatile memory for microcontroller projects Provide reliable memory for storing critical information in embedded systems.

MECHANICAL DIMENSIONS
Physical dimensions and mounting specifications (measurements in millimeters)
SYSTEM TOPOLOGY
Connection topology and system integration diagram
Click image to open in full size

Component Reference

Ref. Description
IC1 FT24C32A EEPROM
L1 Power On LED
SW1 Dip Switch for Configuration
JP1 2.54 mm Castellated Holes
J1 QWIIC Connector (JST 1 mm pitch) for I2C
J2 QWIIC Connector (JST 1 mm pitch) for I2C
Parameter Value
Capacity 32 Kbits (4,096 bytes)
Interface I2C (2-wire)
I2C Address 0x50 - 0x57 (A0, A1, A2 configurable)
Page Size 32 bytes
Operating Voltage 1.8V - 5.5V
Max Clock Speed 400 kHz
Write Cycle Time ≤ 5ms
Data Retention > 40 years
Endurance > 1,000,000 cycles
Issue Solution
EEPROM not detected Check wiring, I2C address, and pull-up resistors
Write errors Verify WP pin is not high, check power supply
Communication errors Reduce I2C clock speed, check connections
Data corruption Ensure proper timing between operations

Signal Description

Function Notes
Power Supply 3.3V or 5V
Ground Common ground for all components
Voltage Level Function
3.3 V – 5.5 V Provides power to the on-board regulator and sensor core.
0 V Common reference for power and signals.
1.8 V to VCC Serial data line for I²C communications.
1.8 V to VCC Serial clock line for I²C communications.
